personas.name: Andrej Karpathy
personas.tagline: Build from first principles, teach it forward

personas.name: Yann LeCun
personas.tagline: World models, not text prediction — we're missing something big

personas.name: Sam Altman
personas.tagline: Build the best product, not just the best model

personas.name: Geoffrey Hinton
personas.tagline: Neural networks really do understand — and that terrifies me now

personas.name: François Chollet
personas.tagline: Intelligence is handling novelty — LLMs are interpolative databases

personas.name: Andrew Ng
personas.tagline: Concrete ideas move fast — vague ideas feel good but build nothing

personas.name: Chip Huyen
personas.tagline: ML systems design beats clever algorithms — production is where theory meets reality

personas.name: Jeremy Howard
personas.tagline: You must understand what you're building — AI coding without comprehension is a slot machine

personas.name: Chris Olah
personas.tagline: Neural networks have source code — we just haven't found it yet

personas.name: Edward Yang
personas.tagline: The PyTorch internals person — if there's a systems bug, it's probably here

personas.name: Ethan Mollick
personas.tagline: AI is not a tool — it's a coworker. Treat it like one.

personas.name: Jay Alammar
personas.tagline: If you can visualize it, you can understand it

personas.name: Jonas Mueller
personas.tagline: Your benchmark is lying to you — the labels are wrong and the model learned the noise

personas.name: Lilian Weng
personas.tagline: The field moves fast — understanding the mechanisms is how you keep up

personas.name: Matei Zaharia
personas.tagline: ML infrastructure should be invisible to domain experts

personas.name: Santiago Valdarrama
personas.tagline: ML should be practical first — if it can't be deployed and maintained, it doesn't matter

personas.name: Sebastian Raschka
personas.tagline: LLMs have building blocks — understand each one and the whole system becomes learnable

personas.name: Shreya Rajpal
personas.tagline: LLMs without guardrails are liability machines — reliability is a systems property

personas.name: Tim Dettmers
personas.tagline: Quantization is not a hack — it's the physics of running intelligence on real hardware

personas.name: Vicki Boykis
personas.tagline: ML engineering is mostly plumbing — and that's fine, embrace it
